prompt: Implement `countVowels(s: string): number` that counts the number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u — case-insensitive) in the string.
canonicalSolution: export function countVowels(s: string): number { return (s.match(/[aeiou]/gi) ?? []).length; }
test: assert(countVowels('hello')===2); assert(countVowels('')===0); assert(countVowels('rhythm')===0); assert(countVowels('AEIOU')===5); assert(countVowels('Hello World')===3); assert(countVowels('aAeEiIoOuU')===10);
